title: Frontend design refresh
task: Improve the first screen of a public documentation site so new developers understand the value faster.
context: The page already works, but the visual hierarchy, CTA order, and mobile scan path need refinement.

route.path: Frontend / Product surface > Public docs landing > Conversion polish
route.reason: Design owns the page hierarchy, Playwright verifies responsive rendering, and QA defines the public-page acceptance checks.

omitted_skills.reason: The site page is static and has no query performance concern.
No API contract is being changed.
